title: Reflected XSS Signal Observed
description: An active replay mutation was reflected in the HTTP response body.
impact: Reflected cross-site scripting can enable session theft, phishing, or arbitrary script execution in the victim browser.
likelihood: High when attacker-controlled input is returned without context-aware output encoding.
recommendations: Apply context-aware output encoding and input validation.
Use Content-Security-Policy as a defense-in-depth control.
Review response templates that render user-controlled parameters.
